Commitment Description: Deployment of SANDF to support police against gang violence and illegal mining in Western Cape and Gauteng
Organisation/Actor: The President, Minister of Police, SANDF
Exact Quote: I have directed the Minister of Police and the SANDF to develop a tactical plan where our security forces should be deployed within the next few days in the Western Cape and Gauteng to deal with gang violence and illegal mining.
Reasoning: To act to rid the country of gang violence and address the threat of organised crime.

Commitment Description: Recruitment of 5,500 additional police officers
Exact Quote: We are putting more boots on the ground through the recruitment this year of 5 500 additional police officers, adding to the 20 000 new officers we announced in previous SoNAs.
Reasoning: To strengthen the fight against crime and make South Africa safe and secure.

Commitment Description: Introduction of the Whistle-Blower Protection Bill in Parliament
Exact Quote: The Whistle-Blower Protection Bill will be introduced in Parliament. Among other things, this will criminalise retaliation and provide psychosocial, legal and financial support to whistle-blowers.
Reasoning: To ensure those who speak out against corruption are not victimised or targeted.

Commitment Description: Finalisation of new Public Procurement Act regulations
Exact Quote: Measures will include the use of technology and the finalisation of new Public Procurement Act regulations by mid-2026.
Reasoning: To restructure the procurement system and end corruption, where the majority of incidents originate.

Commitment Description: Public funding for water and sanitation infrastructure
Exact Quote: We have committed more than R156 billion in public funding for water and sanitation infrastructure over the next three years.
Reasoning: To ensure water security in the long term by building new dams and upgrading infrastructure.

Commitment Description: Incentive for metros to reform water, sanitation, and electricity services
Exact Quote: we have introduced a new R54 billion incentive for metros to reform their water, sanitation and electricity services.
Reasoning: To ensure that revenue from water usage is put straight back into fixing pipes, reservoirs and pumping stations.

Commitment Description: Finalisation of a revised White Paper on Local Government
Exact Quote: Learning from our experience over the past 30 years, we will, in the coming months finalise a revised White Paper on Local Government.
Reasoning: To provide solutions for the functioning of an effective local government system.

Commitment Description: Public investment to build and maintain infrastructure
Exact Quote: Government has committed more than R1 trillion in public investment over three years to build and maintain infrastructure.
Reasoning: To invest in jobs, productivity and growth through infrastructure development.

Commitment Description: Deployment of 10,000 new Extension Officers to support farmers
Exact Quote: We will deploy 10 000 new Extension Officers to support farmers and improve agricultural productivity.
Reasoning: To improve agricultural productivity and create employment opportunities for young people.

Commitment Description: Vaccination of the national cattle herd against foot-and-mouth disease
Exact Quote: We have decided to vaccinate the national herd of 14 million cattle. This requires 28 million vaccines over the next 12 months.
Reasoning: To deal with the outbreak damaging the economy and resulting in export bans.

Commitment Description: Extension of the Electronic Travel Authorisation System
Exact Quote: In the coming year, we will extend the Electronic Travel Authorisation System to all countries that require a visa, enabling applications for tourists to be processed digitally within 24 hours.
Reasoning: To promote tourism as a driver of economic growth.

Commitment Description: Tax deduction for investment in new energy vehicles
Exact Quote: From March this year, we will introduce a 150% tax deduction for investment in new energy vehicles, while supporting the local production of batteries.
Reasoning: To pivot the economy towards green growth and leading supplier of future products.

Commitment Description: Target for raising new investments
Exact Quote: We have now set ourselves a target of raising R2 trillion in new investments over the next five years.
Reasoning: To continue raising investment following the success of the first five Investment Conferences.

Commitment Description: Funding and guarantees for small and medium enterprises (SMEs)
Exact Quote: This year, we will provide more than R2.5 billion in funding to over 180 000 small and medium enterprises, and extend a further R1 billion in guarantees.
Reasoning: To back those who create opportunity and help SMEs overcome regulatory and financial hurdles.

Commitment Description: Increase employment equity targets for persons with disabilities in Public Service
Exact Quote: we are implementing decision to increase employment equity targets of persons with disabilities in the Public Service to 7% by 2030, and to mandate a 7% preferential procurement target across all government and public entities.
Reasoning: To ensure that no one is left behind and correct the injustices of the past.

Commitment Description: Mission to end child stunting and tackle malnutrition
Exact Quote: This year, we will embark on a mission to end child stunting by 2030 and tackle malnutrition among young children, in line with the National Strategy to Accelerate Action for Children.
Reasoning: To address a crisis that affects a child's ability to learn and grow and impacts society as a whole.

Commitment Description: Phase 4 construction of District Six restoration
Exact Quote: With R500 million allocated to this work, we are proceeding with Phase 4 of construction. The restoration of District Six is a goal that we all seek and responsibility that we must all shoulder.
Reasoning: To redress the injustices of the past and build vibrant and cohesive communities.

Commitment Description: Rollout of Lenacapavir for HIV prevention
Exact Quote: we will be undertaking a massive rollout of Lenacapavir, a six-monthly injection that has proven highly effective in preventing HIV transmission.
Reasoning: To prevent and ultimately eliminate HIV and imagine a country without AIDS.

Commitment Description: Hiring of additional labour inspectors
Exact Quote: To tighten enforcement, we will hire an additional 10 000 labour inspectors this year.
Reasoning: To crack down on violations of immigration and labour laws and address illegal immigration risks.

Commitment Description: Launch of Digital ID by Department of Home Affairs
Exact Quote: This year, the DHA will launch a Digital ID to enable safe and secure use of digital services for all South Africans.
Reasoning: To harness digital transformation as a driver of growth, inclusion and effective service delivery.

Commitment Description: Expansion of public dialogues across South Africa
Organisation/Actor: National Dialogue Steering Committee / Eminent Persons Group
Exact Quote: This year, the National Dialogue process will spread across South Africa, reaching every community, every school, every university and college and every part of our society.
Reasoning: To give citizens the opportunity to raise concerns, aspirations and plans for the future.

Commitment Description: Eradication of load reduction
Exact Quote: We will work in each province to address transformer overloading, illegal connections and equipment failure with the objective of eradicating load reduction by next year.
Reasoning: To modernise the energy system and ensure consistent electricity supply.
